title: カワカミプリンセス登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm Kawakami Princess! The spunky Umamusume
aiming to take on the Twinkle Series while at
Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My dream is to become a beautiful, graceful, and courageous princess, just like the heroine of Spitfire Cutie☆Princess Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And if I'm a princess, that makes Trainer like
Princess Fighter's Legendary Trainer! Let's realize
our ideals together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With my idol, King Halo, watching over me, my
battle to become a princess is about to begin! I'll
pulverize anything that gets in my way with my
Princess☆Kick!
